meta.title: Boosting the Middle Class and Improving the Environment: A Discussion with Michael Shellenberger
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with Michael Shellenberger, an environmental journalist and author, on how high-tech energy policies can be used to revitalize the environment, the economy, and the middle class. Hudson Institute Distinguished Fellow Walter Russell Mead will moderate the conversation.
